name: submission_01_spectrogram_champion
reasoning_summary: HIP-G submission #1. Spectrogram champion config (r133/r163, n_seeds=5 confirmed 0.5310 +/- 0.003 -- lowest variance in the ~0.53 tie cluster). Trains on the 41 train subjects, early-stops on val, predicts the blinded 12-subject test split.
